message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged or recorded. I have your account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Please confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I still can’t pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged or recorded. I have verified the account using the borrower profile. I note your hardship signal and that you cannot pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged or recorded. Account ****1184, amount due 8400. Identity verified using borrower profile. You reported hardship and no expected income within 21 days. Hardship review is required.

I’m still unemployed, so I can’t make any payment right now.

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the live path. I can’t offer a payment plan or reduced closure if you can’t commit within 21 days. If you want, I can note this as ongoing hardship and move it to review.
I can’t commit to anything right now. Please just note the hardship review.
Hardship review noted. No payment commitment is required right now. Based on the current policy, the live path is hardship review only.
